# Oil Spill Response

**Summary**: The coordinated actions taken to contain and clean up oil released into the environment.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] developed a framework for oil-spill-response in the Western Arabian Gulf.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] Crucial for protecting coastal ecosystems from industrial accidents.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] Spatial mapping of high-value habitats.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- GIS mapping of seagrass, mangroves, and salt marshes provides critical data for prioritizing response efforts. ([[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016, p. 121]])
